name: tempcoderunnerfile.py
content:
import os, json, tkinter as tk
import ttkbootstrap as ttk
from tkinter import filedialog 
from pil import image, imagetk

index = "index.json"
data = []

def scan():
    global data
    f = filedialog.askdirectory()
    if not f : return
    status.set("scanning...")
    app.update()

    data = []
    for r,_,fs in os.walk(f):
        for x in fs:
            p = os.path.join(r,x)
            try:
                c = open(p,"r",encoding="utf-8",errors="ignore").read().lower()
            except:
                c = ""
            data.append({"name":x.lower(),"path":p,"type":x.split(" .")[-1].lower,"content":c})
    json.dump(data,open(index,"w"))
    status.set(f"{len(data)}indexed")

def load():
    global data
    try:
       data = [i for i in json.load(open(index))if os.path.exists(i["path"])]
       status.set(f"{len(data)}loaded")
    except:
        status.set("no. index")
    
def search(e = none):
    q = search_var.get().strip().lower()
    t = filter_var.get()
    listbox.delete(0, tk.end)
    for i in data:
        if os.path.exists(i["path"]) and (q in i["name"]or q in i["content"]):
            if t == "all" or i["type"]==t.lower():
                listbox.insert(tk.end,i["path"])

    status.set(f"{listbox.size()}results")

def preview(e = none):
    try:
        p = listbox.get(tk.active)
        preview_box.delete("1.0", tk.end)
        if p.split(".")[-1].lower() in ["png","jpg","jpeg"]:
            img = imagetk.photoimage(image.open(p).resize(400,400))
            preview_box.image_create(tk.end, image=img)
            preview_box.image=img
        else:
            preview_box.insert(tk.end,open(p,"r",encoding="utf-8",errors="ignore").read())
    except:
        preview_box.insert(tk.end,"preview not available")

def open_file(e = none):
    try:
        os.startfile(listbox.get(tk.active))
    except:
        pass

app = ttk.window(themename="darkly")
app.title("start search")
app.geometry("1300x750")

search_var = tk.stringvar()
filter_var = tk.stringvar()
status = tk.stringvar(value="ready")
top = ttk.frame(app)
top.pack(fill="x", padx=10, pady=10)
e = ttk.entry(top,textvariable = search_var, font = ("arial",13))
e.pack(side = "left" , fill ="x" , expand = true, padx = 5)
e.bind("<keyrelease>", search)
ttk.button(top, text="scan",command = scan).pack(side = "left",padx=5)
ttk.button(top, text="load",command = load).pack(side = "left",padx=5)

cb = ttk.combobox(top,textvariable = filter_var,values =["all","txt","pdf","png","py","jpg"])
cb.pack(side="right")
cb.bind("<<comboboxselected>>",search)

main = ttk.frame(app)
main.pack(fil= "both",expand = true , padx = 10, pady = 5)
main.columnconfigure(0,weight = 4)
main.columnconfigure(2,weight = 1)
main.rowconfigure(0,weight = 1)

listbox = tk.listbox(main,font = ("consolas",11))
listbox.grid(row = 0, column = 0,sticky = "nsew")

listbox.bind("<buttonrelease-1>",preview)
listbox.bind("<double-button-1>",open_file)

ttk.scrollbar(main,command = listbox.yview).grid(row = 0, column = 1, sticky = "ns")
ttk.scrollbar(main,command = listbox.xview,orient = "horizontal").grid(row = 1, column = 0, sticky = "ew")

preview_box = ttk.text(main,wrap= "none",font=("consolas",11))
preview_box.grid(row = 0, column = 2,sticky = "nsew", padx = (10,0))

ttk.scrollbar(main,command = preview_box.yview).grid(row = 0, column = 3, sticky = "ns")
ttk.scrollbar(main,command = preview_box.xview,orient = "horizontal").grid(row = 1, column = 2, sticky = "ew")


ttk.label(app, textvariable=status).pack(fill="x", padx=10)
app.mainloop()

content:
import os, json, tkinter as tk
import ttkbootstrap as ttk
from tkinter import filedialog 
from pil import image, imagetk

index = "index.json"
data = []

def scan():
    global data
    f = filedialog.askdirectory()
    if not f : return
    status.set("scanning...")
    app.update()

    data = []
    for r,_,fs in os.walk(f):
        for x in fs:
            p = os.path.join(r,x)
            try:
                c = open(p,"r",encoding="utf-8",errors="ignore").read().lower()
            except:
                c = ""
            data.append({"name":x.lower(),"path":p,"type":x.split(".")[-1].lower() if "." in x else "","content":c})
    json.dump(data,open(index,"w"))

def load():
    global data
    try:
       data = [i for i in json.load(open(index))if os.path.exists(i["path"])]
       status.set(f"{len(data)}loaded")
    except:
        status.set("no. index")
    
def search(e = none):
    q = search_var.get().strip().lower()
    t = filter_var.get()
    listbox.delete(0, tk.end)
    for i in data:
        if os.path.exists(i["path"]) and (q in i["name"]or q in i["content"]):
            if t == "all" or i["type"]==t.lower():
                listbox.insert(tk.end,i["path"])

    status.set(f"{listbox.size()}results")

def preview(e = none):
    try:
        p = listbox.get(tk.active)
        preview_box.delete("1.0", tk.end)
        if p.split(".")[-1].lower() in ["png","jpg","jpeg"]:
            img = imagetk.photoimage(image.open(p).resize(400,400))
            preview_box.image_create(tk.end, image=img)
            preview_box.image=img
        else:
            preview_box.insert(tk.end,open(p,"r",encoding="utf-8",errors="ignore").read())
    except:
        preview_box.insert(tk.end,"preview not available")

def open_file(e = none):
    try:
        os.startfile(listbox.get(tk.active))
    except:
        pass

if __name__ == "__main__":
    app = ttk.window(themename="darkly")
    app.title("start search")
    app.geometry("1300x750")

    search_var = tk.stringvar()
    filter_var = tk.stringvar()
    status = tk.stringvar(value="ready")
    top = ttk.frame(app)
    top.pack(fill="x", padx=10, pady=10)
    e = ttk.entry(top,textvariable = search_var, font = ("arial",13))
    e.pack(side = "left" , fill ="x" , expand = true, padx = 5)
    e.bind("<keyrelease>", search)
    ttk.button(top, text="scan",command = scan).pack(side = "left",padx=5)
    ttk.button(top, text="load",command = load).pack(side = "left",padx=5)

    cb = ttk.combobox(top,textvariable = filter_var,values =["all","txt","pdf","png","py","jpg"])
    cb.pack(side="right")
    cb.bind("<<comboboxselected>>",search)

    main = ttk.frame(app)
    main.pack(fil= "both",expand = true , padx = 10, pady = 5)
    main.columnconfigure(0,weight = 4)
    main.columnconfigure(2,weight = 1)
    main.rowconfigure(0,weight = 1)

    listbox = tk.listbox(main,font = ("consolas",11))
    listbox.grid(row = 0, column = 0,sticky = "nsew")

    listbox.bind("<buttonrelease-1>",preview)
    listbox.bind("<double-button-1>",open_file)

    ttk.scrollbar(main,command = listbox.yview).grid(row = 0, column = 1, sticky = "ns")
    ttk.scrollbar(main,command = listbox.xview,orient = "horizontal").grid(row = 1, column = 0, sticky = "ew")

    preview_box = ttk.text(main,wrap= "none",font=("consolas",11))
    preview_box.grid(row = 0, column = 2,sticky = "nsew", padx = (10,0))

    ttk.scrollbar(main,command = preview_box.yview).grid(row = 0, column = 3, sticky = "ns")
    ttk.scrollbar(main,command = preview_box.xview,orient = "horizontal").grid(row = 1, column = 2, sticky = "ew")


    ttk.label(app, textvariable=status).pack(fill="x", padx=10)
    app.mainloop()

name: chat_history.py
content:
import datetime

def save_chat(user_msg, bot_msg):

    with open("chat_history.txt", "a") as file:

        file.write(
            f"\n[{datetime.datetime.now()}]\n"
        )

        file.write(f"you: {user_msg}\n")
        file.write(f"bot: {bot_msg}\n")
